description_long: This is a robust hammer with a solid, cylindrical wooden handle and a heavy, rectangular metal head. The handle is a medium brown color, appearing smooth and straight, and is securely fitted into the head. The head is metallic gray, blocky, and features a flat striking face on one end and a slightly tapered, blunt end on the other, typical of a sledgehammer. The hammer is resting atop a large, black anvil, which has a classic horned shape and a broad, flat working surface. The anvil's surface is smooth and slightly reflective, with angular edges and a sturdy base. No visible markings, logos, or signs of wear are present on the hammer or anvil.
description: A heavy hammer with a straight wooden handle and a rectangular metal head, resting on a large black anvil. Both the hammer and anvil appear clean and well-maintained.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hammer lying across the flat top of the anvil, with the handle extending toward the viewer and the head resting near the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the hammer's handle and the rectangular shape of the metal head, as well as the anvil's horn and base.
description_view_2: Rear view with the hammer's head closest to the viewer, handle extending away, and the anvil's flat rear and base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hammer's handle and head from the other side, with the anvil's horn pointing right.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, smooth, cylindrical, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledge-type steel head with flat striking faces, no claws or peens
